lead_profile_text: Purchase — buying flat for STL near York Minster. Plans to run as holiday let for 8-10 years, using personally for ~10 days per year. Full management model for overseas/absent owner confirmed. (Note: title says Existing STL but PROFILE content explicitly states Purchase.)
delay_trigger_phrases: goal to purchase a one-bedroom flat

top_objections.text: Management and platform fees circa 30-32% of revenue
top_objections.zac_response: Confirmed broadly in line with expectations; York is a particularly strong STL market

top_questions.text: What are the projected net income figures?
top_questions.answer: ~£60,000 annual gross, ~£31,500 net after all fees

top_questions.text: Can Stayful provide an income projection letter for my mortgage broker?

what_moved_them: Income projections exceeded own expectations (£31,500 net vs £30,000 gross assumption)
York described as a particularly strong STL market
Full management model confirmed for overseas/absent owner

conversion_gaps.gap: Purchase not yet completed — property not yet owned
conversion_gaps.how_to_fill: Stay in touch during purchase process; send income projection letter for mortgage broker
